## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why this change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] The change is scoped to one concern.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] stdout remains reserved for MCP protocol traffic.
- [ ] The public-network URL policy remains intact or includes a documented threat model.
- [ ] Markdown remains derived from the canonical structured report.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
